chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-83 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.2391/2023 2. For orders on CMA No.2392/2023 3. For orders on office objection 4. For hearing of main case. 08.08.2025. Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, AAG ------------------------------ This is an old petition of 2022. It was last taken up on 07.03.2023, which is over 02 years ago. In the last 02 years, learned counsel for the petitioner has made no serious efforts to pursue this petition. Despite of the lapse of 02 years, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
